issues.title: ChromaVectorStore doDelete  The return value is null
issues.body: deletedIds The return value is null

comments.body: I discovered this if i bumbed the version of the chroma db, there was a test failure.  ChromaVectorStoreIT.andAndSearch does a delete and the test passes with `ghcr.io/chroma-core/chroma:0.5.11` but not with `ghcr.io/chroma-core/chroma:0.5.17`

After some investigation, I see that this is the result of the [change](https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma/pull/2880) introduced in [chroma:0.5.13 ](https://github.com/chroma-core/chroma/releases/tag/0.5.13). 

Since the delete operation no longer returns the deleted Ids, I will work on a fix to use the status code as a way to verify the correctness of the operation.

issues.title: AWS BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel token usage metrics are missing
issues.body:
**Bug description**
In the AWS BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel sync call the token usage metrics is not returned.
Also bedrock return other very important metric X-Amzn-Bedrock-Invocation-Latency that would be good to include in the spring ai response model

**Environment**
Last M3 version

**Steps to reproduce**
Make a simple call with the BedrockAnthropic3ChatModel 

**Expected behavior**
Have all response metrics that bedrock returns

Thanks in advance

comments.body: This model is no longer supported, api access has been changed to go through the converse APIs.

issues.title: When the function call is used together with RAG, the function call does not work.
